headline: Congress still can’t decide what to do about warrantless surveillance
summary: Legislators are struggling to reauthorize FISA Section 702 before its June 12th deadline. The surveillance act allows warrantless data collection. This is a recurring issue, with a prior short-term reauthorization.

headline: Summer Game Fest Live 2026: The biggest news, trailers, and announcements
summary: Geoff Keighley's annual Summer Game Fest Live event is set for June. The two-hour show will feature major gaming news and announcements. It's taking place live at the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles.

headline: Gone in 60 minutes
summary: Legendary 60 Minutes journalist Scott Pelley was reportedly fired. The firing came after Pelley questioned CBS's leadership. Other correspondents allegedly did not support Pelley.

headline: The Sonos Era 100 speaker is down to its lowest price in months
summary: The Sonos Era 100 smart speaker is currently on sale. It's available for $189 ($30 off) at multiple retailers. This marks its lowest price in months, ideal for new or existing Sonos users.

headline: Resident Evil Veronica Announced, Coming 2027
summary: Capcom announced a remake of Resident Evil: Code Veronica. The reveal occurred during the Summer Game Fest livestream. Fans can expect the game to be released in 2027.

headline: Star City Episode 3 Review — ‘Bad Dancer’
summary: A review of 'Bad Dancer,' the third episode of Star City, is out. The episode intensifies paranoia within Star City. It also develops early character arcs significantly.

headline: For Father's Day, Help Your Old Man Shed His Dad Bod With These Budget-Friendly Exercise Equipment
summary: Father's Day is approaching on June 21st. The article suggests budget-friendly exercise equipment as gifts. Help dads get fit and shed the 'dad bod'.

headline: Get a 36V 500W Adult Electric Bike for $260 Shipped at AliExpress
summary: An adult electric bike is on sale for $260 at AliExpress. The bike features a 36V 500W motor and can reach 23mph. It offers a range of up to 45 miles per charge.

headline: Rapist Paul Quinn's 24-year sentence an insult, says wrongly convicted Andrew Malkinson
summary: Paul Quinn received a 24-year sentence for a 2003 attack. Andrew Malkinson, wrongly convicted for the same crime, served 17 years. Malkinson deems Quinn's sentence an 'insult'.

headline: Downing Street hits out at 'people seeking to stir division' after Vance's Nowak post
summary: Downing Street criticized individuals attempting to 'stir division'. This follows a post by the US vice-president about Henry Nowak's death. Vance's post on X stated the 'only response is righteous anger'.

headline: Buffy and Ted Lasso star Anthony Head dies at 72
summary: British actor Anthony Head has passed away at 72. He was known for roles in Buffy, Ted Lasso, Merlin, and Little Britain. His death was caused by complications from pneumonia.

headline: Ex-Channel 4 News host Jon Snow reveals he has Alzheimer's
summary: Former Channel 4 News lead presenter Jon Snow announced his Alzheimer's diagnosis. Snow fronted C4 News for 32 years. A new film will document his journey navigating the diagnosis.
